witnesses.description: CRT witness satisfying x == 2 mod 3 and x == 3 mod 5.
The residue 5 is a multiplicative inverse of 3 modulo 7.

checks.claim: There exists x satisfying x == 2 mod 3 and x == 3 mod 5.
checks.notes: The validator checks each congruence and pairwise coprimality of the moduli.
The validator checks gcd(3, 7) = 1 and 3 * 5 == 1 mod 7.

checks.claim: There exists b such that 2 * b == 1 mod 6.
checks.notes: The validator exhaustively checks all residues modulo 6 and confirms no inverse exists.

checks.claim: There exist integers b and k such that 2*b - 6*k = 1.

data.certificate: produce_diophantine_evidence emits Evidence::UnsatDiophantine checked by Evidence::check; the certificate records gcd(2,6) does not divide 1

checks.notes: The SMT-LIB artifact encodes the modular inverse equation 2*b == 1 (mod 6) as 2*b - 6*k = 1. Axeyum emits a Diophantine certificate for the gcd divisibility obstruction.

checks.claim: There exists x satisfying x == 1 mod 4 and x == 2 mod 6.

data.certificate: produce_diophantine_evidence emits Evidence::UnsatDiophantine checked by Evidence::check; the certificate records gcd(4,6) does not divide 1

checks.notes: The congruence pair reduces to 4*a - 6*b = 1. Axeyum emits a Diophantine certificate for the gcd divisibility obstruction.

checks.claim: There exists a unit a modulo 5 such that a^4 != 1 mod 5.
checks.notes: The validator checks every unit modulo 5 and finds no counterexample.
